name: Infiltrateur
description: Infecté en phase précoce, encore presque humain en apparence. Les spores invisibles qu'il exhale contaminent discrètement les lignes arrière ennemies.
prompt: Sci-fi grimdark biomechanical horror, early-stage infected infiltrator. Nearly human-looking soldier in damaged military gear, subtle signs of infection. Veins glowing faintly green under skin. Thin wisps of invisible spores from breath. Slightly too-wide smile, eyes with faint purple glow. Standing in shadows of ruined building. Deceptive calm before horror reveal. Cinematic lighting, highly detailed.
